data.title: Dyne Therapeutics closes public offering, selling 21.8M shares at $18.44 each for $402.5M gross proceeds.
data.description: Dyne Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in WALTHAM, Mass., announced on December 11, 2025, that it successfully closed an increased underwritten public offering. The offering consisted of 21,827,549 shares of common stock sold at a public price of $18.44 per share, with an additional 2,847,071 shares issued due to the underwriters exercising their option to purchase more shares. The total gross proceeds for Dyne from this offering amounted to about $402.5 million, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. The entirety of the shares in the offering were provided by Dyne. Dyne Therapeutics is a clinical-stage company specifically dedicated to enhancing functionality for individuals afflicted with genetically induced neuromuscular disorders.

data.title: Crinetics begins pivotal adult trial of Atumelnant in Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia, building on Phase 2 success.
data.description: The Phase 3 clinical trial expands on promising Phase 2 findings by demonstrating fast and consistent decreases in critical disease indicators and clinical assessments for Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia (CAH).

data.title: Datavault AI (NASDAQ: DVLT) sets Dec. 24, 2025, for Dream Bowl Meme Coin token distribution to equity holders and Scilex Company.
data.description: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) has revealed that the distribution date for the Dream Bowl 2026 Meme Coin token to eligible record equityholders of Datavault AI is set on Dec. 24, 2025. The distribution will also include holders of common stock of Scilex Holding Company (NASDAQ: SCLX), as a gesture of appreciation for their close ties with Datavault AI. This token of gratitude is in recognition of Scilex's role as a significant stockholder, licensing partner, and co-sponsor of the upcoming Dream Bowl XIV event happening on Jan. 11, 2026. The record date for the Meme Coin distribution was previously scheduled for Nov. 25, 2025.

data.title: Netskope reports strong Q3 FY2026 financial results in Santa Clara with positive growth.
data.description: Santa Clara, California-based Netskope (NASDAQ:NTSK), a prominent provider of advanced security and networking solutions tailored for the cloud and artificial intelligence era, has disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on October 31, 2025.

data.title: Adamas Trust (Nasdaq: ADAM) declares $0.23/share common stock dividend for Q4 2025, payable Jan 28 to record holders by Dec 22.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Adamas Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADAM) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a routine quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share on its common stock for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. This dividend is set to be disbursed on January 28, 2026, to common stockholders listed as of December 22, 2025.

data.title: Arbor Realty Inc. subsidiary prices $400M 8.50% Senior Notes due 2028 for qualified buyers. Offering expected to close Dec 16.
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. made an announcement on December 11, 2025, regarding its subsidiary, Arbor Realty SR, Inc., revealing the pricing of an offering totaling $400 million in aggregate principal amount of 8.50% Senior Notes due 2028. This offering was conducted through a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933 and to non-United States persons in compliance with Regulation S under the Securities Act. The Notes, which will be the senior, unsecured obligations of the Issuer, are set to be fully and unconditionally guaranteed on a senior, unsecured basis by Arbor. The completion of this offering is anticipated to take place on December 16, 2025, contingent upon the fulfillment of customary closing conditions.

data.title: Northann Corp. (NYSE: NCL) received a non-compliance notice from NYSE due to stockholders' equity requirement of $2M.
data.description: Fort Lawn, South Carolina - December 11, 2025 - Northann Corp. disclosed today that it was notified by NYSE American LLC about its non-compliance with the Exchange's continued listing standards as per Section 1003(a)(i) of the NYSE American Company Guide. This section mandates that a listed company must have stockholders' equity of $2 million or more if it has reported losses from continuing operations and/or net losses in two of its three most recent fiscal years. To address this issue, Northann must adhere to the guidelines outlined in Section 1009 of the NYSE American Company Guide. The company has until January 7, 2026, to submit a plan detailing the actions taken or to be taken in order to meet the listing standards by June 8, 2027.

data.title: The Andersons, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANDE) declares a 20 cents ($0.20) per share cash dividend for Q1 2026, 3% increase from before.
data.description: Maumee, Ohio-based company The Andersons, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANDE) has disclosed plans to issue a cash dividend of 20 cents ($0.20) per share for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on January 23, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as of January 02, 2026. The dividend marks an increase of nearly three percent from the previous quarter.

data.title: Erie Indemnity increases management fee rate, dividends for shareholders in Dec. 9 meeting. $ERIE stock.
data.description: In Erie, Pennsylvania, on December 11, 2025, the Board of Directors of Erie Indemnity Company (NASDAQ: ERIE) made significant decisions at their meeting on December 9, 2025. They established a new management fee rate for Erie Insurance Exchange, sanctioned a rise in shareholder dividends, and announced the usual dividend payout.

data.title: Kitron lands EUR 17 million contract for combat vehicle components, will produce advanced electronics.
data.description: Kitron has recently secured a contract worth approximately EUR 17 million for the manufacturing and delivery of cutting-edge electronic parts utilized in combat vehicle systems.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics closes $602 million public offering, sells 8,050,000 shares at $86 each, total gross proceeds $692.3 million.
data.description: Kymera Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in Watertown, Mass., revealed today the successful closure of its enlarged underwritten public offering, raising $602.0 million through the sale of 8,050,000 shares of common stock, with an additional 1,050,000 shares issued due to underwriters exercising their option. Priced at $86.00 per share, the offering generated about $692.3 million in gross proceeds for Kymera, with deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol KYMR, specializes in developing innovative oral small molecule degrader drugs for treating immunological conditions.

data.title: Greenidge Generation sells South Carolina property for $18M cash and up to $18M in additional payments.
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE) has completed the sale of a 152-acre property in Spartanburg, South Carolina. The property was sold to an affiliate of The Lightstone Group and LightHouse Data Centers for $18.0 million. Greenidge is a cryptocurrency data center and power generation company.

data.title: Tenaya Therapeutics lifts clinical hold on MyPEAK-1 Phase 1b/2a trial after FDA amendments; changes to be implemented.
data.description: Tenaya has finalized protocol amendments for the MyPEAK-1 clinical trial in collaboration with the FDA. The changes are being implemented at sites involved in the study. This development marks a significant milestone in improving the study protocols for MyPEAK-1, which is a crucial aspect of progressing clinical research.

data.title: Frequency Electronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: FEIM) releases Q2 & fiscal year 2026 financial results as of December 11, 2025.
data.description: In Mitchell Field, New York, on December 11, 2025, Frequency Electronics, Inc. (FEI) shared its second quarter and fiscal year 2026 financial outcomes. The company, listed as NASDAQ-FEIM, expressed satisfaction as it presented the numbers.

data.title: Tenaya Therapeutics plans public offering of units (common stock and warrants); may also offer pre-funded units at $0.001/share.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. announced its plans to offer units of common stock and warrants to purchase common stock on the Nasdaq market. The company, based in South San Francisco, aims to develop curative therapies for heart disease. The offering may also include pre-funded units for certain investors at $0.001 per share, with immediate exercise options and no expiration date. All securities in the offering will be from Tenaya. The completion of the offering is contingent on market conditions. No assurance is provided on the final size or terms of the offering.

data.title: Islamorada to host 2025 All-Star Fishing Championship, from Dec 10-14, welcoming top SFC professionals and guests.
data.description: From December 10–14, 2025, a resort in ISLAMORADA, Fla., will host beachside gatherings for the biggest names in SFC's professional league, as well as spectators and broadcasters. Known as the Sportfishing Capital of the World, the event will attract a large audience as the sportfishing world convenes for this exciting occasion.

data.title: Ramon Sanchez has been appointed as Firefly Aerospace's Chief Operating Officer to manage company operations for growth.
data.description: Sanchez has been appointed as Firefly's Chief Operating Officer (COO) to expand his role in overseeing the company's daily operations and facilitating its growth.

data.title: Property management company SITE Centers reveals selling of Downtown Short Pump.
data.description: In recent data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which is a decrease of 0.2% compared to the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month. This positive trend suggests a strengthening job market, with more individuals finding employment opportunities. The decrease in the unemployment rate and the substantial job growth are promising indicators for the country's economic recovery.

data.title: Houston senior housing development receives $750K grant from FHLB Dallas for $29.3 million project in Third Ward.
data.description: In Houston, the groundbreaking ceremony was held for the WALIPP Senior Residences, an affordable housing project aimed at older adults in the city's Third Ward. The endeavor, a collaboration between the William A. Lawson Institute for Peace and Prosperity (WALIPP) and local partners, is receiving significant help in the form of a $750,000 grant from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) via Frost Bank. The total cost of the project is $29.3 million, making it a substantial investment in providing affordable housing options for seniors in the community.

data.title: Dynex Capital, Inc. declares $0.17 dividend per share on Common Stock for Dec 2025 and $0.61437 dividend on Preferred Stock.
data.description: Dynex Capital, Inc. based in Glen Allen, Virginia, revealed today that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.17 per share for its Common Stock (NYSE: DX) for December 2025. This dividend will be disbursed on January 9, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of January 2, 2026. Additionally, the Board sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.61437 per share for its Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: DXPRC) for the fourth quart...
